nasb.text: And He said to them, “What are these words that you are exchanging with one another as you are walking?” And they stood still, looking sad.

esv.text: And he said to them, “What is this conversation that you are holding with each other as you walk?” And they stood still, looking sad.

cnv.text: 耶穌說：“你們走路的時候，彼此討論的是甚麼事呢？”他們就站住，面帶愁容；

ccb.text: 耶稣问他们：“你们一路上在谈论什么？” 他们停下脚步，满面愁容，

csbs.text: 耶稣问他们：“你们一路上彼此谈论的这些，到底是什么事呢？”他们就停住，面带愁容。
